title: gdlc layered config (global + project)
description: Shape shared by both the global layer ($XDG_CONFIG_HOME/gdlc/config.yml) and the project layer (.config/gdlc/config.yml, per ADR-0004). Every top-level section is optional at both layers (the board sub-fields are required once a board section is present); issue #81 designs the project value overriding the global one per top-level section, and issue #82 builds the config-loader that implements it.

targeting.description: Which repos/orgs gdlc's plugins capture issues for. Omitted or empty allowlists mean no restriction.

destination.description: Where captured issues get posted when the capturing repo isn't itself the destination.

board.description: Project-to-org-project-board mapping. Supersedes the legacy board: key formerly in .claude/github-sdlc-planning.local.md (ADR-0004; that fallback is removed as of ADR-0006).

packs.description: Enhancement-pack opt-in toggles (github-bug-capture: hooks, triage-skills, mcp-integration, gh-aw; github-sdlc-planning: skipMutationConfirm; all three hook-bearing plugins: monitors, ADR-0010's background session monitors). Supersedes the legacy packs: map in .claude/github-bug-capture.local.md (ADR-0006). additionalProperties is deliberately open so a plugin can add a new pack name without a schema change; each value must still be a boolean.

prLifecycle.description: PR-lifecycle enforcement opt-in (issue #185): local review before opening a PR, a Copilot review request on open, and a settled check (checks + review + review-thread + code-scanning resolution) before a PR is reported ready. Fail-closed: absent or enabled: false means off, matching every other opt-in surface in this schema (packs, skipMutationConfirm).

localReviewer.description: Command template surfaced to the agent as the local-review gate. Never executed by a hook directly -- a hook can only spawn an OS process, not invoke a Claude Code slash command/skill; this is read and shown as an instruction, not run.

gateNewWorkOnUnresolvedThreads.description: gdlc#202/#211: gate starting new branch/worktree work on any PR opened this session still having unresolved review threads.

confirmLocalReview.description: gdlc#275: whether requireLocalReview's reminder blocks (permissionDecision: 'ask') or is non-blocking context (permissionDecision: 'allow'). Defaults to false, mirroring skipMutationConfirm's opt-out shape -- the reminder still fires, it just doesn't force a prompt. Has no effect unless requireLocalReview is enabled.

confirmNewWorkGate.description: gdlc#275: same opt-out, for gateNewWorkOnUnresolvedThreads's gate. Has no effect unless gateNewWorkOnUnresolvedThreads is enabled.
